description: Advanced fullstack software engineering and technical leadership program covering scalable application architecture, TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystems, DevOps (CI/CD, Docker), cloud computing and agile project management.
Fullstack development training focused on modern web technologies (JavaScript, React, Node.js), software design patterns, API development and database management (SQL/NoSQL).
IT services and systems training covering software development, system administration, networking, cybersecurity fundamentals and enterprise infrastructure management.
Technical training in electronics and digital systems including computer hardware, networking, telecommunications and IT infrastructure fundamentals.
